steps.title: Refer back to the place
steps.content: The previous sentence says the sculpture is built between statues at a park in France. The next sentence describes how it appears in that same location.

steps.title: Reject wrong relationships
steps.content:
• Choice B adds a time sequence that the passage does not need.
  • Choice C signals contrast, but the description supports the same idea.
  • Choice D signals an example, but the sentence is describing the just-named sculpture.

steps.title: Use the location word
steps.content: There refers back to the park in France and smoothly connects the sculpture's placement to its appearance. The answer is A.
